hero.subtitle: Covers melody, interval, chord, jianpu, and rhythm training.
hero.featureHighlight: Built for Musicians Who Practice Seriously

products.title: Five Core Tools
products.subtitle: Professional sight reading practice solutions for different training needs

melody.title: Melody Sight Reading Generator
melody.description: Freely choose note values, precisely control articulations (staccato, legato, accents, etc.), and even set their frequency. Completely tailor practice content to your needs.

interval.title: Interval Sight Reading Generator
interval.description: Targeted training for specific intervals, freely choose which interval types to practice. From major seconds to perfect octaves, master every interval precisely.

chord.title: Chord Sight Reading Generator
chord.description: Supports various chord types: major triads, minor triads, diminished triads, sus, etc. Provides guitar-specific voicings: Drop2, Drop3, Shell Voicing, Close Voicing.

jianpu.title: Jianpu Sight Reading Generator
jianpu.description: Render melodies as numbered notation (jianpu) while keeping full rhythm and key control—ideal for learners who prefer numbered notation.

rhythm.title: Rhythm Sight Reading Generator
rhythm.description: Focused rhythm training with single-line percussion staff, density controls, and syncopation settings to build timing and groove.

feedback.title: User Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Real practice experiences from musicians currently using Cognote
feedback.note: All feedback below comes from real users after practice.

yuxian.author: 雨の弦
yuxian.quote: Practicing just 30 minutes a day clearly deepened my fretboard position awareness. The random rhythms are challenging, but very helpful.

imagonx.author: iMaGonX
imagonx.quote: My staff-reading speed improved a lot, and I can now quickly locate notes on the fretboard. Arpeggios plus speaking note names out loud works very well.

niukuier.author: 牛奎尔
niukuier.quote: I mainly use the melody sight-reading mode. My reading speed is faster than before, and my fretboard interval memory has improved too.

daniel.author: Daniel
daniel.quote: An excellent music-practice tool. It feels like opening the prologue of a sacred book. With consistency, it can truly lead you deeper into music.

xiaobo.author: 骁博Hpa
xiaobo.quote: After a period of practice, my staff-reading speed became noticeably faster. It's convenient to use right away, and the challenge level is great.

ati9700m20.author: ati9700m20
ati9700m20.quote: For staff reading, my note recognition is much faster than before. I have improved on complex rhythms, but I still can't get through them perfectly in one pass every time. On the fretboard side, I have also made clear progress, and with simple rhythms at slow tempos I can basically control the full fretboard.

features.title: Powerful
features.subtitle: Professional-grade features to help you reach new musical heights

customize.title: Fully Customizable
customize.description: Freely choose key signatures, time signatures, note values, and note-frequency.

guitarVoicing.title: Guitar Exclusive Features
guitarVoicing.description:
Provides guitar-specific voicings (Drop2, Drop3, Shell Voicing, Close Voicing)
Provides guitar-specific articulations (staccato, legato, accents, etc.)

articulations.title: Multi-Device Support
articulations.description: Optimized interfaces for desktop, iPad, and mobile. The desktop software currently supports macOS, Windows, and Linux, while mobile users can install it as a PWA.

multiInstrument.title: Multi-Instrument Support
multiInstrument.description: Suitable for guitar, piano, violin, bass, and various other instruments, meeting the needs of different performers.

randomOrTonal.title: Musical
randomOrTonal.description: Notes are randomly generated yet musically coherent, making every exercise both challenging and realistic.

affordable.title: MIDI Input
affordable.description: Connect a MIDI keyboard for input, with latency and velocity calibration to improve accuracy and feel.

payment.title: Begin Your
payment.accessCodeTitle: 🔑 Already Have an Access Code? Use It Now

suitable.title: Who is this for?
suitable.description: If you want to read faster, react quicker, and play more steadily, this will probably fit you really well.
suitable.point1: Especially helpful for music learners who want to build sight-reading in a more systematic way.
suitable.point2: It is particularly great for guitar players, but it also works well for piano, violin, bass, and other instruments.

bundleOrSingle.title: Should I get the complete edition or a single tool?
bundleOrSingle.description: If you want a more complete and structured sight-reading routine, I would start with the complete edition.
bundleOrSingle.point1: The complete edition is better for long-term, well-rounded training.
bundleOrSingle.point2: If you only want to fix one specific weak spot first, starting with a single tool is totally fine too.

webVsApp.title: What is the difference between the web version and the app version?
webVsApp.description: The training idea is the same in both. The main difference is how you want to use it.
webVsApp.point1: The web version is great for getting started quickly and fitting practice into your day.
webVsApp.point2: The app version is better for long-term, stable use and generally feels a bit more complete.

mobileApp.title: Is there a mobile app?
mobileApp.description: There are no current plans for a native mobile app, but you can just use the web version on your phone or tablet and the experience is basically the same.
mobileApp.point1: The web tools work well on phones and tablets, including iPad.
mobileApp.point2: If you prefer practicing on a mobile device, you can simply open the webpage and start right away without installing anything extra.

whyEffective.title: Why is this more effective than traditional practice?
whyEffective.description: Traditional practice can still help, but repeating the same examples for too long often turns them into familiar answers.
whyEffective.point1: Cognote keeps generating fresh material, so you are not just memorizing the same questions.
whyEffective.point2: It can also adapt to your training goal, which makes it much better for long-term, targeted sight-reading practice.

forgotCode.title: Forgot Your Access Code?

codeNotWorking.description: If the tool is still in trial mode after entering the verification code, just refresh the page a few times. If the problem persists, please contact our customer support.
